name: BEST SPAC I Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I Introduction BEST SPAC I Acquisition Corp. (the Company) is a blank check company incorporated as a British Virgin Island (BVI) business company on December 13, 2024. The Company was incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the Business Combination).
